title: Decisioning Content
description: A content field used in decisioning, containing a content type and an expression.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/decision.title: Content Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/decision.description: The media type of the content field expression. Indicates how the expression value should be interpreted.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/decision.title: Expression
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/decision.description: The expression string representing the content. The format is determined by the contentType property.
